import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"OpenID Connect Userinfo"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/userinfo"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns the payload of the ID Token, including `session.id_token` values, of the provided OAuth 2.0 Access Token's
consent request.

In the case of authentication error, a WWW-Authenticate header might be set in the response with more information about the error.
See [the spec](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6750#section-3) for more details about header format.

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./get-oidc-user-info.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./get-oidc-user-info.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
